sql_array: CREATE TABLE vhosts (id INT PRIMARY KEY, vhost VARCHAR(255), lhost VARCHAR(255), lpath VARCHAR(255), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO vhosts (id, vhost, lhost, lpath) VALUES (1, 'www.foo.com:8889', 'host.foo.com:8889', '/appsimple');
INSERT INTO vhosts (id, vhost, lhost, lpath) VALUES (2, 'www.bar.com:8888', 'host.bar.com:8888', '/appcomplex');
SELECT * FROM vhosts WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM vhosts WHERE lhost = 'host.foo.com:8889');
SELECT vhost, lhost, lpath FROM vhosts WHERE lpath NOT IN (SELECT lpath FROM vhosts WHERE vhost = 'www.bar.com:8888') AND created_at < NOW();
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vhosts WHERE created_at NOT IN (SELECT MAX(created_at) FROM vhosts GROUP BY vhost HAVING COUNT(*) > 1);
SELECT vhost, COUNT(*) FROM vhosts GROUP BY vhost HAVING COUNT(*) NOT IN (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT lhost) FROM vhosts);
SELECT vhost FROM vhosts WHERE vhost LIKE '%.com' AND id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM vhosts WHERE lhost IS NULL);
SELECT vhost FROM vhosts WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM vhosts WHERE lpath = '/invalidpath' OR lpath IS NULL);
CREATE TABLE test_paths (path_id INT PRIMARY KEY, path_name VARCHAR(255), vhost_id INT, FOREIGN KEY (vhost_id) REFERENCES vhosts(id));
INSERT INTO test_paths (path_id, path_name, vhost_id) VALUES (1, 'test_path_1', 1);
INSERT INTO test_paths (path_id, path_name, vhost_id) VALUES (2, 'test_path_2', NULL);
SELECT path_name FROM test_paths WHERE path_id NOT IN (SELECT vhost_id FROM vhosts WHERE lpath = '/appsimple' AND vhost NOT IN ('www.foo.com:8889', 'www.bar.com:8888'));
CREATE TABLE temp_hosts (temp_id INT, temp_name VARCHAR(255), vhost_id INT);
INSERT INTO temp_hosts (temp_id, temp_name, vhost_id) SELECT id, vhost, id FROM vhosts WHERE vhost NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT lhost FROM vhosts);
SELECT temp_name FROM temp_hosts WHERE temp_id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT vhost_id FROM test_paths WHERE path_name IS NULL);
SELECT vhost FROM vhosts WHERE (vhost_id NOT IN (SELECT path_id FROM test_paths WHERE path_name = 'name_with_special_char$') OR lhost IS NULL);
SELECT lhost FROM vhosts WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM test_paths WHERE vhost_id = vhosts.id AND vhost_id IS NOT NULL);
SELECT lpath FROM vhosts WHERE (created_at IS NOT NULL AND lpath NOT IN (SELECT lpath FROM vhosts WHERE vhost = 'www.error.com:9999')) OR lpath = '';
CREATE TABLE vhosts_invalid (id INT, vhost VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, lhost VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, lpath VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT chk_path CHECK (lpath <> ''));
INSERT INTO vhosts_invalid (id, vhost, lhost, lpath) VALUES (3, NULL, 'host.invalid.com:8888', '/path_invalid');
